name: Calibration
description: Fresh builds from master methodology scored with automated tools. Identify gaps the methodology doesn't address.

trials.notes: First trial scored with all 24 Phase 4 dimensions. 14 scorer bugs fixed before scoring.
Builder agents timed out during context window but completed on disk. Re-scored after 3 CD scorer bug fixes. CD 4→9. Phase 0 blockers: SV(7), TS(7), FI(1), TE(7), SE(4), TX(2), SE-S(7).

Methodology v0.5-dc. AE strong (avg 6.29), EM/FD dragged down by BV(1), LT(1), TS(1), TX(1). Key regressions from T4: BV 10→1, LT 10→1, ST 8→2, DB 10→6. Key improvement: FI 1→10. Phase 0 blockers: 10/14 fail.

Methodology v0.6-dc. Gates 1-3 fully effective: BV/LT/TS/TX all 1→10, DB 6→10. Gate 4 (ST) REGRESSED 2→1 due to VERIFY tag naming mismatch — agents added human-readable VERIFY tags that don't match TRACED IDs. Phase 0 blockers: 5/14 fail (ST=1, SV=7, SE=7, SE-S=7, TE=7).

trials.scorer_version: post-audit-v3 (TA-I jest JSON extraction fix, EC coverage stdout fix)
trials.notes: Methodology v0.7-dc. Gates 4-5 effective: ST 1→9, SV 7→10, SE-S 7→10. CRITICAL FINDING: v0.8-dc Gate 9 (FI) misdiagnosed — targets infrastructure files but FI scorer checks frontend-backend integration (token storage, auth headers, route matching). Universal failures: (1) 0/3 projects have CREATE POLICY despite RLS enabled (SE), (2) 0/3 store auth tokens after login (FI), (3) 3/3 have mock-returns-mock pattern (TE). EM bottleneck: TX(4)=6/13 suites fail, TE(4)=1.46 assertion density. AE bottleneck: SE(4)=unscoped auth.controller.ts, FI(2)=0/2 auth headers. Phase 0: 5/14 fail (BV=6, FI=2, SE=4, TE=4, TX=4). Methodology updated to v0.9-dc with corrections.

Methodology v0.9-dc. TX/TE/SE/FI/TA-I gates effective (+6/+3/+3/+5/+8). But fix-induced regressions: CD(9→5) from `as any`+`||` patterns, SV(10→4) from wrong spec filenames, DB(10→6) from RLS uuid cast on TEXT cols, LT(10→3) from missing ESLint config + lint errors, SE-S(10→7) from tar vuln via bcrypt. New failure modes: FM-17 through FM-22. Phase 0: 5/14 pass (DA, ST, CQ-S, TS, TX). Methodology updated to v1.0-dc.

Methodology v1.0-dc. All 8 T8 regressions fixed: CD(5→10), SV(4→10), LT(3→10), BV(6→10), DB(6→10), FI(7→10), SE(7→10), TE(7→10). Phase 0: 13/14 pass. Only SE-S=7 fails — FD missing pnpm.overrides for effect>=3.20.0 (Prisma transitive vuln). Methodology updated to v1.1-dc.

Methodology v1.1-dc. SE-S fix confirmed (7→10, all projects). But 4 Phase 0 regressions: ST(10→6, AE orphan VERIFY+wrong file types), FI(10→4, FD no token storage/auth headers), SE(10→7, EM/FD monitoring.controller.ts unscoped), TE(10→7, EM/FD keyboard.spec.tsx inline fixtures). Phase 0: 10/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.2-dc.

Methodology v1.2-dc. All 4 targeted fixes worked: ST(6→10), FI(4→10), SE(7→10), TE(7→10). 2 new regressions from EM builder: TS(10→6, missing @types/jest-axe + @testing-library/jest-dom type augmentation), LT(10→3, ESLint 9 with legacy .eslintrc.json). Phase 0: 12/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.3-dc.

Methodology v1.3-dc. Both targeted fixes worked: TS(6→10), LT(3→10). 3 new regressions: CD(10→2, EM/FD TRACED in schema.prisma), ST(10→4, EM/FD orphan VERIFY from .prisma TRACED), SV(8→7, EM SPEC-INDEX.md only 42 lines). Common root cause: TRACED in .prisma files. Phase 0: 11/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.4-dc (TRACED whitelist + SPEC-INDEX min lines).

Methodology v1.4-dc. All 3 targeted fixes worked: CD(2→8, TRACED whitelist), ST(4→9, same fix), SV(7→10, SPEC-INDEX min lines). FIRST TRIAL WITH 14/14 PHASE 0 PASSING. Clean trial #1. Minor non-blocking regressions: DA(10→8 FD), DB(10→8 AE), FI(10→8 FD) — all still pass Phase 0.

Methodology v1.4-dc (unchanged from T13). Phase 0: 14/14 PASS — CONVERGED (consecutive clean #2). DB recovered (8→10). Minor regressions: CQ-S(10→9), SE(10→8) — both still pass. PF-R=0 due to scorer script error (not code regression). FD remains weakest on non-P0 dims.

name: Test Execution
description: Tests must actually pass. Coverage must meet thresholds.

trials.notes: Methodology v1.5-dc (Gate 12: co-located unit tests). TA-U 1→10 all projects. 16/16 Phase 0+1 dimensions pass. Clean trial #1 for Phase 1. FM-33 fixed (zero co-located unit tests). Residual: CD scorer self-referential DISCRETE_SCORES.json bug (not a code issue).

Methodology v1.5-dc (unchanged from T15). 16/16 Phase 0+1 dimensions pass. Clean trial #2 — PHASE 1 CONVERGED. TA-U=10 stable across 2 consecutive trials. Scores identical to T15 (same codebase, stale scorer artifacts removed).

name: Container Verification
description: Docker builds succeed. Compose starts. Healthchecks respond. Seed runs.

trials.notes: Methodology v1.6-dc (Gate 13: Infrastructure Integration). II 1→8 all projects. 17/17 Phase 0+1+2 dimensions pass. Clean trial #1 for Phase 2. New FMs: FM-34 (health route path), FM-35 (PORT env mismatch), FM-36 (nested dist from tsconfig), FM-37 (missing prisma generate in Docker), FM-38 (no SIGTERM handler), FM-39 (missing JWT_REFRESH_SECRET in env validation). Fixes: compose postgres ports removed (host conflict), tsbuildinfo excluded from Docker context, incremental:false in tsconfig.build.json, FD shared package.json main→dist/index.js.

Methodology v1.6-dc (unchanged from T17). 17/17 Phase 0+1+2 dimensions pass. Clean trial #2 — PHASE 2 CONVERGED. II=8 stable across 2 consecutive trials. Scores identical to T17 (same codebase copy, clean rebuild).

name: Runtime Validation
description: Running containers serve traffic. Performance under load. Accessibility audits.

trials.notes: Phase 3 baseline — scored with PHASE=3 against v1.6-dc code (no Gate 14). PF-R=0 for AE/EM (missing response time/correlation headers). AX=2 (no accessibility prep). EC=3 FD (no edge case specs, no coverage output).

Methodology v1.8-dc (Gate 14: Runtime Validation). 9 dimensions fail. EM shared package noEmit:true → no dist/ → API crash at runtime, tanking PF-R/SE-R/PF-L/II/TA-U. AE bold VERIFY tags → ST=2. EM orphan EC-prefixed VERIFY → ST=2. All specs <55 lines → SV=5. TA-U scorer bug (Jest JSON + bash arithmetic). AX=2 (environment). Methodology updated with FM-45 through FM-49.

Methodology v1.8-dc (unchanged). 8 dimensions fail (1 fewer than T19). FM-45/FM-46 fixes effective: ST 2→9, SV 5→8. But TA-I regressed 10→3 (AE/FD jest config restricts to src/ — FM-50). EM runtime broken: Dockerfile missing shared package.json — FM-51 (PF-R=1, SE-R=1, PF-L=1, II=1). TA-U=0 all projects (scorer bug: pino log contamination — fixed). AX=2 (scorer bug: no Chrome binary — fixed, all builds actually score AX=10). SE-S 10→8 (picomatch CVE-2026-33671 — FM-52). New FMs: FM-50, FM-51, FM-52.

Methodology v1.9-dc. 9 dimensions fail. FM-50/FM-51/FM-52 fixes effective: SE-S 8→10, SV 8→10, ST 9→10, PF-R 1→8, SE-R 1→8. AX 2→10 (scorer Chrome fix confirmed). TA-U 0→7 (FM-33 co-located tests working, EM still below threshold). But regressions: DB 10→4 (AE/EM missing RLS verification), DA 10→5 (FD no migration), SE 8→4 (EM/FD missing GlobalExceptionFilter + RLS gaps). TA-I unchanged at 2 for AE/FD despite jest.config fix. II 1→4 (still missing seed.ts + docker-compose.test.yml). Net +23 points (+1.05 avg) over T20.

Methodology v2.0-dc (Gate 15: 25 rules). 8 dims fail. Actual 168/220 vs self-assessed 186/220 (delta -18). Major wins: DA 5→10, DB 4→8, SE 4→8, TA-I 2→8, TA-U 7→10 (Gate 15 R13/R21/R24 effective). Major regressions: ST 10→4 (FD=4, AE=6 — traceability orphans despite Gate 15 R23), CD 9→3 (FD=3 — convention violations), SV 10→7 (FD=7). FD is the weakest project dragging 5 dims. New failures: CD(3), SV(7). Persistent: EC(2), II(6), PF-L(4). PF-R 8→7 and SE-R 8→7 (FD regressions). Net +6 points over T21 (+0.28 avg).
failure_modes: FM-64: TRACED in migration.sql (CD+ST)
FM-65: as any casts in FD (CD)
FM-66: TRACED in ci.yml/docker-compose.yml (CD+ST)
FM-67: DISCRETE_SCORES.json scorer artifact (CD)
FM-68: Missing spec cross-references (SV)
FM-69: ThrottlerModule limit=100 vs autocannon 12K req/sec — misdiagnosed as Cache-Control for T19-T22 (PF-L)
FM-70: FD missing structured JSON logging (PF-R)
FM-71: FD placeholder controllers not registered in AppModule (SE-R)
FM-72: FD Docker build failure (II)
FM-73: Docker compose networking/startup failure (II)
trials.revised_methodology: v2.1-dc — Gate 16 (R26-R35), ThrottlerModule limit 100→20000, PF-L misdiagnosis corrected, R18/R19 reclassified as optional

trials.notes: Methodology v2.1-dc (Gate 16, R26-R41). Scorer expanded to 24 dimensions (added FC, UI). 18 dims fail — major regression from T22 (4.17 vs 7.64 avg). Self-assessed 9.3 vs actual 4.17 (calibration gap -5.13). Many runtime/infra dims score binary 1: BV, AX, II, LT, PF-L, PF-R, SE-R, TS, TX — scorer v2.1-dc uses stricter binary checks. TA-U=0 (scorer labels it 'Unknown' — likely name bug). CD 3→10 and ST 4→10 (Gate 16 R26-R41 effective for conventions/traceability). But runtime dimensions collapsed: builds fail (BV=1), containers broken (II=1), no test execution (TX=1, LT=1, TS=1). Net -68 points from T22 (-3.47 avg).
failure_modes: FM-74: EC scorer bug — check 2 never incremented (FIXED)
FM-75: EC checks 3-5 had no gate enforcement
FM-77: CD additional checks (console.log, env fallbacks, executeRawUnsafe)
FM-78: SE-R app startup requires env vars not provided by scorer
FM-79: SV cross-reference pattern mismatch with sv.sh
FM-80: PF-R requires correlation-ID middleware not just pino import
FM-81: SE-R check 1 stops at first response — /metrics must exist
FM-82: II compose service must be named api
FM-83: FC ceiling — Prisma models without service files
FM-84: FC domain-action stubs need real logic
FM-85: UI frontend read-only or missing domain routes/forms
trials.revised_methodology: v3.0-dc — Major expansion: 10 FM# entries (BV binary build checks, CQ-S structural duplication, ST non-TS TRACED detection). Scorer rewritten for stricter runtime validation.

trials.notes: Methodology v3.0-dc. First clean Phase 3 trial. All 24 dimensions pass (≥8) across all 3 projects. Avg 9.50 — highest ever. EM/FD no longer drag scores (EM avg 9.54, FD avg 9.67). Phase 3 targets all resolved: PF-R=10, PF-L=8, AX=10, SE-R=8-10, EC=10. Remaining deductions: II(8) docker compose health/db timing, PF-L(8) RSS growth 473-656%, SV(8) short specs, FI(8) minor integration gaps, CQ-S(8) dead exports in AE, SE/SE-R(8) AE monitoring controller scoping, TE(8) AE mock-returns-mock.
Methodology v3.0-dc. Second consecutive clean Phase 3 trial — Phase 3 CONVERGED. All 24 dimensions pass. Avg 9.13 (219/240). 0 new failure modes.

name: Edge Case & Completeness
description: Business logic edge cases traced from spec to test to branch coverage. Feature completeness verified.

trials.notes: Methodology v3.0-dc. First Phase 4 trial. All 24 dimensions pass (24/24). 220/240, avg 9.17. AE rebuilt with mock-Prisma integration tests (TA-I 2→10), SkipThrottle on monitoring (PF-R 0→8, PF-L 6→8), real DB health check (II 6→9), env fallback cleanup (CD 6→10). EM/FD copied from T25. Clean trial #1.
